message:
docs: Simplify package exports and add framework examples

- Remove non-existent React/Vue/Svelte export paths from package.json
- Add React, Vue, Svelte code snippets to README
- Fix import paths (remove /browser suffix)
- Add .npmignore to exclude test/temp files from publish
- Update .gitignore to exclude temp files

Package now ready for npm publish.

files.patch:
@@ -8,4 +8,8 @@ node_modules/
 # Build outputs
 dist/
 *.tsbuildinfo
-test-results/
+
+# Temp files
+*.txt
+benchmark-results.json
+logs.test

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# Test files
+tests/
+test-results/
+playwright-report/
+playwright.config.js
+
+# Temp files
+*.txt
+benchmark-results.json
+
+# Source maps (optional - remove if you want them published)
+# dist/*.map
+
+# Build config
+esbuild.config.js
+scripts/
+
+# Packages (symlink)
+packages/
+
+# Source (dist is published)
+src/
